title: monardella breweri subsp. breweri
intro: Monardella breweri subsp. breweri is a subspecies of the Monardella breweri plant, also known as Brewer's monardella, which is a type of flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Monardella breweri subsp. breweri include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
